case_title: WILMER PEREZ GOMEZ VS. IGOR ELGART

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, WILMER PEREZ

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, WILMER PEREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELGART, IGOR DBA SAN MATEO ROOFING AND MAINTENANCE CO. $7,302.64 PRINCIPAL, $64.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,592.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
